notes: RUST_CODE.BBS's public board list. Six visible from start; four hidden (THE_GROVE / THE_RIVER_HOUSE / THE_BASEMENT / THE_ATTIC) appear only after their dial-up clues are followed — discovery weeks per bbs/hidden_boards.json. The hidden boards live in the same dir tree under threads_path so the loader is uniform; the engine just hides them in the board list until unlocked.

boards.name: MAINSTREET
boards.subtitle: the public square
boards.flavor: Frasier reads, sometimes posts. The enemy reads MAINSTREET too — choices here are visible.

boards.name: THE_BAR
boards.subtitle: Graustark regulars
boards.flavor: The surviving son posts. Sammy posts (rare now). Hector when he has news. Reading enough unlocks the son's memorial fragments about Dante.

boards.name: THE_LIBRARY
boards.subtitle: the archive
boards.flavor: Elicia's board. Files to download — audio, photos, scans of vol5-era documents.

boards.name: THE_WORKSHOP
boards.subtitle: Frasier's technical board
boards.flavor: Tech threads. Hidden technical unlocks for the player.

boards.name: THE_RECTORY
boards.subtitle: religious / municipal cross-talk
boards.flavor: Paul's aide lurks here under a handle.

boards.name: THE_ART_WALL
boards.subtitle: the public gallery
boards.flavor: ASCII art submissions, MIDI uploads, signed and unsigned. The oldest pieces are six years stale, the newest from last Tuesday.

boards.name: THE_BACK_PORCH
boards.subtitle: offtopic · the regulars hang out
boards.flavor: Where hasslein / uzhekwurm / jlowe / chainlinkspiral and the rest of the regulars talk about everything that is not the work. Movies, video games, sports, karaoke, history, Lynch. The sysops read and rarely post.

boards.name: THE_GROVE
boards.subtitle: Small Wood · the enemy reads here
boards.flavor: Discoverable via a dial-up clue in MAINSTREET.

boards.name: THE_RIVER_HOUSE
boards.subtitle: costs cover to read
boards.flavor: A board run by someone Frasier knows but doesn't trust. Reading costs cover.

boards.name: THE_BASEMENT
boards.subtitle: the demon roster rests
boards.flavor: Spending a BBS night here reduces all active demon burn by 1.

boards.name: THE_ATTIC
boards.subtitle: old grief, the dead
boards.flavor: A memorial board. Read-only. Reading unlocks POV documents about vol5-era losses.

boards.name: THE_BACKCHANNEL
boards.subtitle: the room where the sysops talk to each other
boards.flavor: Visible to the player after they've read at least one thread on each of the four external sysop BBSes AND at least one SNACKS bleached-counter thread.
